channel.title: Mouhamed on Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Mouhamed on Portfolio

item.title: Experience
item.description:
Full Stack Engineer — Internship

IntellectSoft DZ · Setif, Algeria · Hybrid Sep 2025 – Jan 2026 · 5 months

Built and maintained full-stack web applications during a hands-on internship at a local software company. Responsible for maintaining two production projects:

  • Okwin — an e-commerce platform
  • MeddX — a medical web application

Stack: Django REST Framework, React.js

Head of Linux Department

SESC Club · Setif, Algeria Current

Head of Linux department at the university’s tech club, helping fellow students get comfortable with Linux, the terminal, and open-source tooling.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
A selection of things I’ve built — ranging from CLI tools and system-level libraries to full-stack web apps and Android applications.

Hospital Records Management System

2nd place National AI & Programming University Olympiad (Wilaya level)

A full-stack birth and death records management system built for the Olympiad. Features role-based access control, real-time Server-Sent Events for live record updates, anonymized data exports for researchers, and PDF generation for official records.

Stack: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, React, Tailwind CSS, JWT
View on GitHub →
